title: fix: keep model category tabs stable
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Shows all built-in model category tabs immediately
- Keeps the table section list aligned with those tabs
- Prevents Audio/Realtime/Embedding tabs from appearing late after catalog load

Validation:
- npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/models.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/model-table.tsx
- npm run typecheck (enter.pollinations.ai)

gist.headline: Nailing down the tabs
gist.blurb: No more jumping UI! We've pinned down the model category tabs so they load instantly, keeping your browsing experience smooth and stable.
gist.summary: Fixed a layout shift in the models catalog by rendering all built-in category tabs (including Audio, Realtime, and Embedding) immediately rather than waiting for the catalog data to load.
gist.impact: Browsing the model catalog is now smoother, with no jarring UI jumps or late-appearing tabs.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a carpenter or organizer, physically nailing down or organizing digital folder tabs so they don't move. Represents UI stability and fixing layout shifts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a small hammer to nail down glowing digital folder tabs on a retro computer screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
